name: @artale/pi-odu
description: Odu pattern engine for Pi. 256-state binary classifier based on the Ifa system. Read 8 channels, classify, act.
readme:
# pi-odu

Odu 256-state binary pattern engine for Pi. Based on the Ifá divination system — UNESCO Intangible Heritage of Humanity (2008).

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:@artale/pi-odu
```

## Commands

```
/odu read <situation>    — analyze through 8 binary channels
/odu cast                — random Opele chain throw
/odu pattern <0-255>     — lookup specific pattern
/odu table               — show 16 Oju Odu (principal figures)
/odu channels            — explain the 8 channels
```

## Tools

- `odu_read` — analyze a situation (8 channels → 256 states → action)
- `odu_cast` — random cast like throwing the Opele chain
- `odu_lookup` — look up pattern by number

## Example

```
/odu read Should I launch this product now?

Pattern: ███░████ (239)
Left Odu:  Ogbe — The Supporter
Right Odu: Osa — Spirit of Oya
Combined:  Ogbe-Osa

Range:  PEAK (239/255)
Action: HARVEST — take what is offered

Channels:
  █ Macro       — trend is up
  █ Sector      — domain momentum strong
  █ Volume      — high activity
  ░ Volatility  — (silent)
  █ Sentiment   — positive signals
  █ Correlation — matches known success patterns
  █ Liquidity   — resources available
  █ Micro       — immediate trigger present
```

## The System

16 principal Odu (Ojú Odù) × 16 = 256 combined patterns. Each pattern has a name, a range, and an action. The Opele chain has 8 half-nuts — each falls open (1) or closed (0) — producing an 8-bit binary pattern.

Possibly 6000+ years old. The oldest binary classification system in human history.

## See also

- [odu](https://github.com/arosstale/odu) — the full reference repo
- [clawhub.ai/odu](https://clawhub.ai) — OpenClaw skill version
